titles.ar: بَابُ مَا نَصَّ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ رَسُولُهُ عَلَى الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) وَاحِداً فَوَاحِداً
titles.en: Chapter 64 – What was Stipulated by Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic and His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup> upon the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, one then one

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح بسنديه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (213/ 3)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَ أَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَ أُولِي الْأَمْرِ مِنْكُمْ فَقَالَ نَزَلَتْ فِي عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليهم السلام )
فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّ النَّاسَ يَقُولُونَ فَمَا لَهُ لَمْ يُسَمِّ عَلِيّاً وَ أَهْلَ بَيْتِهِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ

قَالَ فَقَالَ قُولُوا لَهُمْ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَزَلَتْ عَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَ لَمْ يُسَمِّ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ ثَلَاثاً وَ لَا أَرْبَعاً حَتَّى كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هُوَ الَّذِي فَسَّرَ ذَلِكَ لَهُمْ وَ نَزَلَتْ عَلَيْهِ الزَّكَاةُ وَ لَمْ يُسَمِّ لَهُمْ مِنْ كُلِّ أَرْبَعِينَ دِرْهَماً دِرْهَمٌ حَتَّى كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هُوَ الَّذِي فَسَّرَ ذَلِكَ لَهُمْ وَ نَزَلَ الْحَجُّ فَلَمْ يَقُلْ لَهُمْ طُوفُوا أُسْبُوعاً حَتَّى كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هُوَ الَّذِي فَسَّرَ ذَلِكَ لَهُمْ

وَ نَزَلَتْ أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَ أَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَ أُولِي الْأَمْرِ مِنْكُمْ وَ نَزَلَتْ فِي عَلِيٍّ وَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي عَلِيٍّ مَنْ كُنْتُ مَوْلَاهُ فَعَلِيٌّ مَوْلَاهُ وَ قَالَ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أُوصِيكُمْ بِكِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِي فَإِنِّي سَأَلْتُ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ لَا يُفَرِّقَ بَيْنَهُمَا حَتَّى يُورِدَهُمَا عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ فَأَعْطَانِي ذَلِكَ وَ قَالَ لَا تُعَلِّمُوهُمْ فَهُمْ أَعْلَمُ مِنْكُمْ وَ قَالَ إِنَّهُمْ لَنْ يُخْرِجُوكُمْ مِنْ بَابِ هُدًى وَ لَنْ يُدْخِلُوكُمْ فِي بَابِ ضَلَالَةٍ

فَلَوْ سَكَتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَلَمْ يُبَيِّنْ مَنْ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ لَادَّعَاهَا آلُ فُلَانٍ وَ آلُ فُلَانٍ وَ لَكِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْزَلَهُ فِي كِتَابِهِ تَصْدِيقاً لِنَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنَّما يُرِيدُ اللَّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمُ الرِّجْسَ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ وَ يُطَهِّرَكُمْ تَطْهِيراً فَكَانَ عَلِيٌّ وَ الْحَسَنُ وَ الْحُسَيْنُ وَ فَاطِمَةُ ( عليهم السلام ) فَأَدْخَلَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) تَحْتَ الْكِسَاءِ فِي بَيْتِ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ ثُمَّ قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ لِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ أَهْلًا وَ ثَقَلًا وَ هَؤُلَاءِ أَهْلُ بَيْتِي وَ ثَقَلِي فَقَالَتْ أُمُّ سَلَمَةَ أَ لَسْتُ مِنْ أَهْلِكَ فَقَالَ إِنَّكِ إِلَى خَيْرٍ وَ لَكِنَّ هَؤُلَاءِ أَهْلِي وَ ثِقْلِي

فَلَمَّا قُبِضَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ عَلِيٌّ أَوْلَى النَّاسِ بِالنَّاسِ لِكَثْرَةِ مَا بَلَّغَ فِيهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ إِقَامَتِهِ لِلنَّاسِ وَ أَخْذِهِ بِيَدِهِ فَلَمَّا مَضَى عَلِيٌّ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَسْتَطِيعُ عَلِيٌّ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيَفْعَلَ أَنْ يُدْخِلَ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ وَ لَا الْعَبَّاسَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ وَ لَا وَاحِداً مِنْ وُلْدِهِ إِذاً لَقَالَ الْحَسَنُ وَ الْحُسَيْنُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى أَنْزَلَ فِينَا كَمَا أَنْزَلَ فِيكَ فَأَمَرَ بِطَاعَتِنَا كَمَا أَمَرَ بِطَاعَتِكَ وَ بَلَّغَ فِينَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَمَا بَلَّغَ فِيكَ وَ أَذْهَبَ عَنَّا الرِّجْسَ كَمَا أَذْهَبَهُ عَنْكَ

فَلَمَّا مَضَى عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ الْحَسَنُ ( عليه السلام ) أَوْلَى بِهَا لِكِبَرِهِ فَلَمَّا تُوُفِّيَ لَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ أَنْ يُدْخِلَ وُلْدَهُ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيَفْعَلَ ذَلِكَ وَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ وَ أُولُوا الْأَرْحامِ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلى بِبَعْضٍ فِي كِتابِ اللَّهِ فَيَجْعَلَهَا فِي وُلْدِهِ إِذاً لَقَالَ الْحُسَيْنُ أَمَرَ اللَّهُ بِطَاعَتِي كَمَا أَمَرَ بِطَاعَتِكَ وَ طَاعَةِ أَبِيكَ وَ بَلَّغَ فِيَّ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَمَا بَلَّغَ فِيكَ وَ فِي أَبِيكَ وَ أَذْهَبَ اللَّهُ عَنِّي الرِّجْسَ كَمَا أَذْهَبَ عَنْكَ وَ عَنْ أَبِيكَ

فَلَمَّا صَارَتْ إِلَى الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) لَمْ يَكُنْ أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ يَدَّعِيَ عَلَيْهِ كَمَا كَانَ هُوَ يَدَّعِي عَلَى أَخِيهِ وَ عَلَى أَبِيهِ لَوْ أَرَادَا أَنْ يَصْرِفَا الْأَمْرَ عَنْهُ وَ لَمْ يَكُونَا لِيَفْعَلَا ثُمَّ صَارَتْ حِينَ أَفْضَتْ إِلَى الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَجَرَى تَأْوِيلُ هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ وَ أُولُوا الْأَرْحامِ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلى بِبَعْضٍ فِي كِتابِ اللَّهِ
ثُمَّ صَارَتْ مِنْ بَعْدِ الْحُسَيْنِ لِعَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ثُمَّ صَارَتْ مِنْ بَعْدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ إِلَى مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
وَ قَالَ الرِّجْسُ هُوَ الشَّكُّ وَ اللَّهِ لَا نَشُكُّ فِي رَبِّنَا أَبَداً .

مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ وَ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ الْحُرِّ وَ عِمْرَانَ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus and Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad Abu Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [4:59] O you who believe! Obey Allah and obey the Rasool and those in authority from among you. So heasws said: ‘It was Revealed regarding Aliasws Bin Abu Talibasws, and Al-Hassanasws and Al-Husaynasws’.

So I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The people are saying, ‘So what was the matter with Him<sup>azwj</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> did not Name Ali<sup>asws</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household in the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic?’

He (the narrator) said, ‘So heasws said: ‘Say to them that Rasool-Allahazwj, the Salāt was Revealed unto himsaww and Allahazwj did not Specify to them, neither three nor four until it was Rasool-Allahsaww, hesaww was the one who explained that to them. And the Zakāt was Revealed unto himsaww, and Heazwj did not Specify to them it would be one Dirham from every forty Dirhams until it was Rasool-Allahsaww, hesaww was the one who explained that to them. And the Hajj was Revealed, but Heazwj did not Say to them that they should be performing Tawāf of seven circuits until it was Rasool-Allahsaww, hesaww was the onesaww who explained that to them.

And it was Revealed [4:59] O you who believe! Obey Allah and obey the Rasool and those in authority from among you, and it was Revealed regarding Aliasws and Al-Hassanasws and Al-Husaynasws. So Rasool-Allahsaww said regarding Aliasws: ‘The one whose Master Isaww was, so Aliasws is his Masterasws’. And hesaww said: ‘Isaww bequeath you with the Book of Allahazwj and the Peopleasws of mysaww Household, for Isaww asked Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic that there should be no separation between the two until they both return to mesaww at the Fountain. So Heazwj Granted mesaww that’. And hesaww said: ‘Do not (try to) teach themasws, for theyasws are more learned than you all’. And said: ‘Theyasws will never exit you from a door of Guidance and will never enter you into a door of straying’.

So, had Rasool-Allahsaww remained silent and did not clarify who the Peopleasws of hissaww Household were, they would have claimed it, the family of so and so, and family of so and so, but Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Revealed it in Hisazwj Book in Ratification of Hisazwj Prophetsaww [33:33] But rather, Allah Desires to Keep away the uncleanness from you, O people of the House! And to Purify you a with a Purification. So it was Aliasws, and Al-Hassanasws, and Al-Husaynasws, and Syeda Fatimaasws. So Rasool-Allahsaww included themasws underneath the cloak in the room of Umm Salmaas, then said: ‘O Allahazwj! For every Prophetsaww are family members, and reliable ones, theyasws are the Peopleasws of mysaww Household and mysaww reliable ones’. So Umm Salmaas said: ‘Aren’t Ias from youras family?’ So hesaww said: ‘Youasws are towards goodness, but theyasws are myasws familyasws and my reliable ones’.

So when Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> passed away, it was Ali<sup>asws</sup> who was the closest of the people (of Holy family<sup>asws</sup>) than the (other) people due to the abundance of what Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> had delivered with regards to him<sup>asws</sup>, and his<sup>saww</sup> standing him<sup>asws</sup> for the people and grabbing him<sup>asws</sup> by the hand. So when Ali<sup>asws</sup> passed away, Ali<sup>asws</sup> did not have the leeway and would not do so that he<sup>asws</sup> should include Muhammad Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> nor Al-Abbas<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>, nor anyone from his<sup>asws</sup> sons, when Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> and Al-Husayn Could have said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High Revealed regarding us<sup>asws</sup> just as He<sup>azwj</sup> Revealed regarding you<sup>asws</sup>, so He<sup>azwj</sup> Commanded with obedience for us<sup>asws</sup> just as He<sup>azwj</sup> Commanded with obedience for you<sup>asws</sup>, and Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> delivered regarding us<sup>asws</sup> just as he<sup>saww</sup> delivered regarding you<sup>asws</sup>, and He<sup>azwj</sup> Removed the uncleanness from us<sup>asws</sup> just as He<sup>azwj</sup> Removed it from you<sup>asws</sup>’.

So when Aliasws passed away, it was Al-Hassanasws who was closest with it due to his being elder. So when heasws passed away, heasws did not have the leeway that heasws should include hisasws son, and heasws would not have done that and Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [33:6] and the possessors of relationships are nearer to each other in the Ordinance of Allah, so heasws would make it to be in hisasws son, when Al-Husaynasws could have said: ‘Allahazwj has Commanded with obedience to measws just as Heazwj had Commanded with obedience to youasws and obedience to yourasws fatherasws, and Rasool-Allahsaww delivered regarding measws just as hesaww delivered regarding youasws and regarding yourasws fatherasws, and Allahazwj Removed the uncleanness from measws just as Heazwj had Removed it from youasws and from yourasws fatherasws’.

So when it (Imamate) came to be to Al-Husaynasws, there did not happen to be a leeway from any one from hisasws family that he should claim upon it just as heasws had a claim upon hisasws brotherasws, and upon hisasws fatherasws. Had heasws intended to divert the matter from himasws, heasws could not have done so. Then, it came to be, as a result, to Al-Husaynasws. And so flowed the explanation of this Verse [33:6] and the possessors of relationships are nearer to each other in the Ordinance of Allah.

Then it came to be, from after Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, to Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>. Then it came to be, from after Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, to Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The ‘الرِّجْسُ’ uncleanness, it is the doubt. By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! We<sup>asws</sup> do not doubt in our<sup>asws</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, ever!’

Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Khalid and Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Bin Imran Al Halby, from Ayoub Bin Al Hurr and Imran Bin Ali Al Halby, from Abu Baseer, from Abu Abdullahasws, similar to that.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus and Ali ibn Muhammad from Sahl ibn Ziyad, abu Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has said that he asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the following words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “Believers, obey God, His Messenger, and your leaders (who possess Divine authority). . .” [4:59] The Imam (a.s.) said, “This was sent from heavens about Ali ibn abu talib al-Hassan and al-Husayn (a.s.).” I then said, “People say, “Why did He not specify Ali and his family by their names in the book of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High?’” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Say to them, ‘The command for prayer came to the Messenger of Allah but He has not specified (the number of the Rak‘ats) for them three nor four. It, in fact, was the Messenger of Allah who explained to them this matter. The command for Zakat (a form of income tax) came to the Messenger of Allah and there was no specific taxable number such as one Dirham on every forty Dirham. It was the Messenger of Allah who explained it for them. The command for Hajj came to the Messenger of Allah. It did not say walk senven times around the Ka‘ba It was the Messenger of Allah who explained it for them. The verse about obedience came “Believers, obey God, His Messenger, and your leaders (who possess Divine authority). . .” [4:59] It came to declare that Ali, al-Hassan and al-Husayn (a.s.) were the leards who possessed Divine authority. The Messenger of Allah then said about Ali (a.s.), “On whoever I have Divine Authority, then Ali (a.s.) has Divne Authority over him also.” He also has said, “I enjoin you to follow the book of Allah and my family because have prayed to Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High not to separate these two from eachother until He will make them arrive al-Kawthar (at the pool of Paradise) to meet me. He has granted my prayer as suCh” The Holy Prophet (s.a.) has said, “Do not try to teach them (The Imam (a.s.) becaue they are far more knowledgeable than you.” The Holy Prophet (s.a.) has said, “The Imam (a.s.) will never take you out of the gate of guidance and they never make you enter the gate of misguidance.” Had the Messenger of Allah remained silent and would not explain anything about his Ahl al-Bayt (family) the family of so and so would have advanced their claim for Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority). However, Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has revealed it in His book to confirm the explanantions of His Prophet about Ahl al-Bayt (in the following verse), “People of the house, God wants to remove all kinds of uncleanliness from you and to purify you thoroughly.” [33:33] Ali, Fatima, al-Hassan andlhy (a.s.) were there and the Holy Prophet (s.a.) made them to enter under al-Kisa’ (the Cloack) in the house of ’Umm salama and then said, “O Lord, every prophet has a family and a gravity, and these are my family and gravity.” ’Umm Salama at this point said, “Am I not of your family?” The Holy Prophet (s.a.) said, “You are in goodness but these are my family and my gravity.” Whe the Messenger of Allah passed away Ali (a.s.) had the utmost priority and guardianship of the people all because of what the Messenger of Allah had preached about him. It was because of raising him up for the people and holding his hand in his hand. When Ali (a.s.) (was about to) passed away he could not (and would not) enter Muhammad ibn Ali or al-‘Abbass ibn Ali or anyone of his other sons in the position of Imamt. Otherewise, al-Hassan and al-Husayn (a.s.) would have said, “Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has revealed about us jus as He has done so about you, and He has commaned people to obey us just as He has commanded people to obey you. The Messenger of Allah has preached to people about us just as he has done so about you. Allah has removed al-Rijs uncleanliness from us just as He has done so to you. When Ali (a.s.) left this world, al-Hassan had the utmost priority for Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority) because he was the eldest. When was about to die he could not, and would not, enter his sons in the position of Imamat.It is because ;Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, says, “. . The relatives are closer to each other, according to the Book of God, than the believers and the emigrants. .” [33:6] He then places Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority) in his sons. If so, al-Husayn (a.s.) would have said, “Allah has commanded people to obey me just as He has commanded people to obey you and to obey your father. The Messenger of Allah has preached to people about me just as he has preached to people about you and your father. Allah has removed al-Rijs (unleanliness) from me just as He has removed from you and your father. When the Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority) was infull force with al-Husayn (a.s.) there was no one in his family to who could claim against him as he could calim against his brother and father, had they wanted to diver it from him and they would not do so. After them it found its place with al-Husayn (a.s.) and the interpretation of this verse continued, “. . The relatives are closer to each other, according to the Book of God, than the believers and the emigrants. . .” [33:6] After al-Husayn (a.s.) Imamat (Leadership with Divine Authority) found its place with Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.). After Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) it (Leadership with Divine Authority) found its place with Muhammad ibn Ali (a.s.).” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Al-Rijs means doubts, I swear by Allah that we never doubt in our Lord.” Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Khalid and al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Yahya ibn ‘Imran al-Halabi from Ayyub ibn al-Hurr and ‘Imran ibn Ali al-Halabi from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) a similar hadith.

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (249/ 3)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ النَّبِيُّ أَوْلى بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ وَ أَزْواجُهُ أُمَّهاتُهُمْ وَ أُولُوا الْأَرْحامِ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلى بِبَعْضٍ فِي كِتابِ اللَّهِ فِيمَنْ نَزَلَتْ فَقَالَ نَزَلَتْ فِي الْإِمْرَةِ إِنَّ هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ جَرَتْ فِي وُلْدِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ بَعْدِهِ فَنَحْنُ أَوْلَى بِالْأَمْرِ وَ بِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ وَ الْأَنْصَارِ

قُلْتُ فَوُلْدُ جَعْفَرٍ لَهُمْ فِيهَا نَصِيبٌ قَالَ لَا قُلْتُ فَلِوُلْدِ الْعَبَّاسِ فِيهَا نَصِيبٌ فَقَالَ لَا فَعَدَدْتُ عَلَيْهِ بُطُونَ بَنِي عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ كُلَّ ذَلِكَ يَقُولُ لَا قَالَ وَ نَسِيتُ وُلْدَ الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَدَخَلْتُ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهِ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ هَلْ لِوُلْدِ الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فِيهَا نَصِيبٌ فَقَالَ لَا وَ اللَّهِ يَا عَبْدَ الرَّحِيمِ مَا لِمُحَمَّدِيٍّ فِيهَا نَصِيبٌ غَيْرَنَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Ibn Muskan, from Abdul Raheem Bin Rawh Al Qaseyr,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [33:6] The Prophet is closer to the Believers than their own selves, and his wives are their mothers; and the possessors of relationships some of them are closer to others in the Book of Allah, ‘Regarding whom was it Revealed?’ So heasws said: ‘It was Revealed regarding (Divine) Authority. This Verse flowed among the sons of Al-Husaynasws from after himasws. Thus weasws are the closest with the Authority and with Rasool-Allahsaww from the Momineen and the Emigrants and the Helpers’.

I said, ‘So the sons of Ja’far<sup>as</sup> (Al-Tayyar), is there a share for them in it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’. I said, ‘So the son of Al-Abbas, is there a share in it?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said No’. So I number upon him<sup>asws</sup> the bellies (womb relationships) of the sons of Abdul Muttalib<sup>as</sup>. For each of that he<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘No’. And I forgot the sons of Al-Hassan<sup>as</sup>, so I went over to him<sup>asws</sup> after that and I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Is there for the sons of Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> a share in it?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, O Abdul Rahman! There is not for a Muhammady a share in it apart from us<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isi from his father from ‘Abdallah ibn al-Mughirah from ibn Muskan from ‘Abd al-Rahim ibn Ruh al-Qasir from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “The Prophet has more authority over the believers than themselves. His wives are their mothers. The relatives are closer to each other, according to the Book of God, than the believers and the emigrants. However, you may show kindness to your guardians. This also is written in the Book.” [33:6] About who this verse has come? He then said, “It came about the governance (Leadership with Divine Authority). This verse continued to apply to the lineage of al-Husayn (a.s.) after him. We, thus, are of a proirity to governance (Leadership with Divine Authority) and to the Messenger of Allah than the beleivers of immigrants and the Ansar.” The narrator has said that then he asked the Imam (a.s.), “Do the sons of Ja‘far have any share in it?” The Imam (a.s.) said,”No, they do not have any share in it.” I asked, “Do the sons of al-‘Abbass have any hsare in it?” He said , “No, they do not have any share in it.” I counted for him the folks from the descendents of ‘Abd al-Muttalib and in answer to all he would say, “No.” The narrator has said that then he forgot the sons of al-Hassan (a.s.). I went to see at another time andasked him, “Do the sons of al-Hassan (a.s.) have any share in it?” He replied, “No, I sweatr by Allah, O ‘Abd al-Rahim, no one related to Muhammad has any share in it except us.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/249)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِنَّما وَلِيُّكُمُ اللَّهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا قَالَ إِنَّمَا يَعْنِي أَوْلَى بِكُمْ أَيْ أَحَقُّ بِكُمْ وَ بِأُمُورِكُمْ وَ أَنْفُسِكُمْ وَ أَمْوَالِكُمُ اللَّهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا يَعْنِي عَلِيّاً وَ أَوْلَادَهُ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ

ثُمَّ وَصَفَهُمُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَقَالَ الَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ الصَّلاةَ وَ يُؤْتُونَ الزَّكاةَ وَ هُمْ راكِعُونَ وَ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي صَلَاةِ الظُّهْرِ وَ قَدْ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَ هُوَ رَاكِعٌ وَ عَلَيْهِ حُلَّةٌ قِيمَتُهَا أَلْفُ دِينَارٍ وَ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَسَاهُ إِيَّاهَا وَ كَانَ النَّجَاشِيُّ أَهْدَاهَا لَهُ

فَجَاءَ سَائِلٌ فَقَالَ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ اللَّهِ وَ أَوْلَى بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ تَصَدَّقْ عَلَى مِسْكِينٍ فَطَرَحَ الْحُلَّةَ إِلَيْهِ وَ أَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَيْهِ أَنِ احْمِلْهَا فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِيهِ هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ وَ صَيَّرَ نِعْمَةَ أَوْلَادِهِ بِنِعْمَتِهِ فَكُلُّ مَنْ بَلَغَ مِنْ أَوْلَادِهِ مَبْلَغَ الْإِمَامَةِ يَكُونُ بِهَذِهِ الصِّفَةِ مِثْلَهُ فَيَتَصَدَّقُونَ وَ هُمْ رَاكِعُونَ وَ السَّائِلُ الَّذِي سَأَلَ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الَّذِينَ يَسْأَلُونَ الْأَئِمَّةَ مِنْ أَوْلَادِهِ يَكُونُونَ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Al Hashimy, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Isa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [5:55] But rather, only Allah is your Guardian and His Rasool and those who believe. Heasws said: ‘But rather it Means, ‘Closest with you’, i.e., ‘more rightful with you and with your affairs and your own selves and your wealth’, Allahazwj and Hisazwj Rasoolsaww and those who believe, Meaning Aliasws and hisasws children, the Imamsasws up to the Day of Judgment.

Then Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Described them, so Heazwj Said [5:55] those who are establishing the Prayers and are paying the Zakāt while bowing, and it was Amir Al-Momineenasws during the Zohr Salāt, and heasws had already prayed two Cycles (of it) and heasws was bowing (performing Ruku’) and upon himasws was an apparel the price of which was a thousand Dinars, and it was the Prophetsaww who had clothed himasws with it, and it was (the Ethiopian king) Al-Najjashy who had gifted it to himsaww.

So a beggar came over and said, ‘The greeting be upon youasws, O Guardianasws of Allahazwj, and the one closest with the Momineen than their own selves, give charity to upon a poor one’. So heasws dropped the apparel to him and gestured with hisasws hand towards it that he should carry it away. So Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Revealed this Verse with regards to it, and the Bounty of hisasws children can to be with hisasws Bounty. So everyone from hisasws children to whom reached the Imamate, happened to be with this characteristic similar to himasws, so theyasws (also) were giving charity while they were bowing (performing Ruku’); and the beggar who begged from Amir Al-Momineenasws was from the Angels, and those who are begging the Imamsasws from hisasws children are (all) happening to be from the Angels’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad al-Hashimi from his father from Ahmad ibn ‘Isa from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.). The Imam (a.s.) has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “Only God, His Messenger, and the true believers who are steadfast in prayer and pay alms, while they kneel during prayer, are your guardians.” [5:55] It means to have greater priority and authority to deal with your affairs, your souls and your property. Such priority and authority belong to Allah His Messenger and the believers, Ali and his descendents who are the Imams until the Day of Judgment. Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has then described them saying, “. . the true believers who are steadfast in prayer and pay alms, while they kneel during prayer,. .” Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) was praying Zuhr (early afternoon) he was in the second Ruku‘ (bowing ddown). He was wearing a gown that vallued a thousand Dinar (unit of money). The Holy Prophet (s.a) had made him t wear it. King Najashi had sent it as present to him. A begger came and said the Islamic greeting words, “Be in peace O Allah’s authority and the aauthority over the believers who possesses greater priority over them than their onw selves. Give some charity to a destitute. He threw the gown to the begger and pointed with his hand to pick up and take it. At such time Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, sent this verse of the Holy Quran. He combined His blessings with hiis belessing in the form of his children. Whoever of his children with whom Imamat found place was due to this blessing was like him (in giving charity). They would give charity while bowed down in Ruku‘ of prayer. The begger that asked Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) for chaarity was from the angels. Those who ask the Imams from his children will also be from the angels.”

translations.bn: আলী ইবনে ইব্রাহীম তাঁর পিতার সূত্রে, তিনি ইবনে আবী উমায়রের সূত্রে, তিনি উমর ইবনে উযায়নার সূত্রে, তিনি যুরারা, আল-ফুযায়ল ইবনে ইয়াসার, বুকায়র ইবনে আ'ইয়ান, মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে মুসলিম, বুরায়দ ইবনে মুআবিয়া ও আবুল জারুদ — সকলে মিলে — আবু জা'ফার (আঃ) থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন যে তিনি বলেছেন:
translations.de: Ali ibn Ibrahim, von seinem Vater, von Ibn Abi Umayr, von Umar ibn Udhayna, von Zurara, al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, Bukayr ibn A'yan, Muhammad ibn Muslim, Burayd ibn Muawiya und Abu al-Jaroud — alle zusammen — von Abu Ja'far (F.s.i.) der sagte:
translations.en: Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abi Umayr, from Umar ibn Udhayna, from Zurara, al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, Bukayr ibn A'yan, Muhammad ibn Muslim, Burayd ibn Muawiya, and Abu al-Jaroud — all together — from Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) who said:
translations.es: Ali ibn Ibrahim, de su padre, de Ibn Abi Umayr, de Umar ibn Udhayna, de Zurara, al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, Bukayr ibn A'yan, Muhammad ibn Muslim, Burayd ibn Muawiya y Abu al-Jaroud — todos juntos — de Abu Ja'far (p.b.b.) quien dijo:
translations.fa: علی بن ابراهیم از پدرش، او از ابن ابی عمیر، او از عمر بن اذینه، او از زراره و فضیل بن یسار و بکیر بن اعین و محمد بن مسلم و برید بن معاویه و ابوالجارود همگی از ابو جعفر علیه السلام روایت کردند که فرمود:
translations.fr: Ali ibn Ibrahim, de son père, d'Ibn Abi Umayr, d'Umar ibn Udhayna, de Zurara, al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, Bukayr ibn A'yan, Muhammad ibn Muslim, Burayd ibn Muawiya et Abu al-Jaroud — tous ensemble — d'Abu Ja'far (p.b.l.) qui dit :
translations.id: Ali bin Ibrahim dari ayahnya, dari Ibnu Abi Umayr, dari Umar bin Udhayna, dari Zurara, al-Fudhayl bin Yasar, Bukayr bin A'yan, Muhammad bin Muslim, Burayd bin Muawiyah, dan Abu al-Jaroud — semuanya bersama — dari Abu Ja'far (as) yang bersabda:
translations.ru: Али ибн Ибрахим, от своего отца, от Ибн Абу Умайра, от Умара ибн Узайны, от Зурары, аль-Фудайла ибн Йасара, Букайра ибн А'йана, Мухаммада ибн Муслима, Бурайда ибн Муавийи и Абу аль-Джаруда — все вместе — от Абу Джа'фара (мир ему), который сказал:
translations.tr: Ali b. İbrahim, babasından, o da İbn Ebu Umeyr'den, o da Ömer b. Uzayne'den, o da Zurare, el-Fudeyl b. Yesar, Bükeyr b. A'yen, Muhammed b. Müslim, Bureyd b. Muaviye ve Ebu'l-Carûd'dan — hepsi birlikte — Ebu Ca'fer (a.s.)'dan rivayet ettiler, buyurdu ki:
translations.ur: علی بن ابراہیم نے اپنے والد سے، انہوں نے ابن ابی عمیر سے، انہوں نے عمر بن اذینہ سے، انہوں نے زرارہ، فضیل بن یسار، بکیر بن اعین، محمد بن مسلم، برید بن معاویہ اور ابو الجارود سب نے مل کر ابو جعفر علیہ السلام سے روایت کی کہ آپ نے فرمایا:
translations.zh: 阿里·伊本·易卜拉欣从其父，从伊本·艾比·欧迈尔，从欧麦尔·伊本·乌宰纳，从祖拉拉、富代尔·伊本·亚萨尔、布凯尔·伊本·艾扬、穆罕默德·伊本·穆斯林、布雷德·伊本·穆阿维叶和阿布·贾鲁德——所有人共同——从阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐福于他）传述，他说：

translations.bn: আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লা তাঁর রাসূলকে আলীর ওলায়াতের ব্যাপারে নির্দেশ দিলেন এবং তাঁর উপর অবতীর্ণ করলেন:
translations.de: Gott, Mächtig und Majestätisch, befahl Seinem Gesandten die Wilaya von Ali, und offenbarte ihm:
translations.en: God, Mighty and Majestic, commanded His Messenger with the wilayah of Ali, and revealed to him:
translations.es: Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, ordenó a Su Mensajero la wilaya de Ali, y le reveló:
translations.fa: خداوند عز و جل به پیامبرش فرمان داد که ولایت علی را اعلام کند و بر او نازل کرد:
translations.fr: Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, a ordonné à Son Messager la wilaya d'Ali, et lui a révélé :
translations.id: Allah Azza wa Jalla memerintahkan Rasul-Nya dengan wilayah Ali, dan menurunkan kepadanya:
translations.ru: Аллах, Могучий и Величественный, повелел Своему Посланнику вилайят Али, и ниспослал ему:
translations.tr: Allah (azze ve celle) Rasulünü Ali'nin velayetiyle ilgili emretti ve ona indirdi:
translations.ur: اللہ عز وجل نے اپنے رسول کو علی کی ولایت کا حکم دیا اور ان پر نازل کیا:
translations.zh: 安拉至尊命令了他的使者阿里的威拉亚，并降示他：

translations.bn: [৫:৫৫] নিশ্চয়ই তোমাদের ওলী কেবল আল্লাহ, তাঁর রাসূল এবং যারা ঈমান এনেছে, যারা নামাজ কায়েম করে এবং যাকাত আদায় করে।
translations.de: [5:55] Wahrlich, nur Gott ist euer Beschützer und Sein Gesandter und die Gläubigen, die das Gebet verrichten und die Zakat entrichten.
translations.en: [5:55] Verily, only God is your guardian and His Messenger and those who believe, those who establish salat and give zakat.
translations.es: [5:55] En verdad, solo Dios es vuestro guardián y Su Mensajero y quienes creen, quienes establecen la salat y dan el zakat.
translations.fa: [۵:۵۵] همانا ولی شما فقط خداست و رسول او و کسانی که ایمان آوردند، همان‌ها که نماز را برپا می‌دارند و زکات می‌دهند.
translations.fr: [5:55] En vérité, votre wali n'est que Dieu et Son Messager et ceux qui croient, ceux qui accomplissent la salat et s'acquittent de la zakat.
translations.id: [5:55] Sesungguhnya hanya Allah wali kalian dan Rasul-Nya dan orang-orang yang beriman, yang mendirikan salat dan membayar zakat.
translations.ru: [5:55] Воистину, вашим покровителем является только Аллах, Его Посланник и верующие, которые совершают намаз и выплачивают закят.
translations.tr: [5:55] Şüphesiz sizin veliniz ancak Allah'tır ve O'nun Rasulü'dür ve iman edenlerdir; onlar namazı kılanlar ve zekat verenlerdir.
translations.ur: [۵:۵۵] بے شک تمہارا ولی صرف اللہ ہے اور اس کے رسول اور وہ لوگ جو ایمان لائے جو نماز قائم کرتے ہیں اور زکوٰۃ دیتے ہیں۔
translations.zh: [5:55]你们的主人只是安拉和他的使者以及信士们——那些奉行礼拜并纳天课者。

translations.bn: এবং তিনি উলুল আমরের ওলায়াতকে ফরজ করলেন। কিন্তু তারা জানত না এটা কী, তখন আল্লাহ মুহাম্মাদ (সাঃ)-কে নির্দেশ দিলেন যে তিনি যেন ওলায়াতের ব্যাখ্যা তাদের কাছে করেন, যেমন তিনি নামাজ, যাকাত, রোযা ও হজের ব্যাখ্যা করেছিলেন। যখন আল্লাহর পক্ষ থেকে সেই আদেশ আসল তখন রাসূলুল্লাহ (সাঃ)-এর বক্ষ সংকীর্ণ হয়ে গেল এবং তিনি ভয় পেলেন যে মানুষ তাদের ধর্ম থেকে ফিরে যাবে এবং তাকে মিথ্যা বলবে। তখন তাঁর বক্ষ সংকীর্ণ হল এবং তিনি তাঁর প্রভু আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লার কাছে ফিরে গেলেন। তখন আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লা তাঁর প্রতি ওহী পাঠালেন:
translations.de: Und Er machte die Wilaya der Ulu al-Amr zur Pflicht. Aber sie wussten nicht, was es war, also befahl Gott Muhammad (F.s.u.s.F.), ihnen die Wilaya zu erklären, wie er ihnen das Gebet, die Zakat, das Fasten und die Hajj erklärt hatte. Als dieses Gebot von Gott zu ihm kam, wurde die Brust des Gesandten Gottes (F.s.u.s.F.) dadurch beklommen, und er fürchtete, dass sie von ihrer Religion abfallen und ihn der Lüge bezichtigen würden. Seine Brust wurde beklommen und er wandte sich an seinen Herrn, Mächtig und Majestätisch. Dann offenbarte Gott, Mächtig und Majestätisch, ihm:
translations.en: And He made obligatory the wilayah of the Ulu al-Amr. But they did not know what it was, so God commanded Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) to explain the wilayah to them just as he had explained to them the salat, the zakat, the fasting, and the hajj. So when that command came to him from God, the chest of the Messenger of God (peace be upon him and his family) was constricted by it, and he feared that they would apostatize from their religion and that they would belie him. So his chest was constricted, and he referred to his Lord, Mighty and Majestic. Then God, Mighty and Majestic, revealed to him:
translations.es: E hizo obligatoria la wilaya de los Ulu al-Amr. Pero ellos no sabían qué era, así que Dios ordenó a Muhammad (p.b.d.b.f.) que les explicara la wilaya tal como les había explicado la salat, el zakat, el ayuno y el hajj. Cuando ese mandato llegó de Dios, el pecho del Mensajero de Dios (p.b.d.b.f.) se oprimió por ello, y temió que apostataran de su religión y lo desmintieran. Su pecho se oprimió y recurrió a su Señor, Poderoso y Majestuoso. Entonces Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, le reveló:
translations.fa: و ولایت اولی الامر را واجب کرد. مردم نمی‌دانستند این چیست، پس خداوند به محمد صلی الله علیه و آله امر کرد که ولایت را برای آن‌ها تفسیر کند، همان‌طور که نماز و زکات و روزه و حج را برای آن‌ها تفسیر کرده بود. وقتی این فرمان از جانب خدا به او رسید، سینه رسول الله صلی الله علیه و آله از این امر تنگ شد و هراس داشت که مردم از دینشان بازگردند و او را تکذیب کنند. سینه‌اش تنگ شد و به پروردگارش عز و جل رجوع کرد. پس خداوند عز و جل به او وحی کرد:
translations.fr: Et Il a rendu obligatoire la wilaya d'Uli al-Amr. Mais ils ne savaient pas ce que c'était, alors Dieu a ordonné à Muhammad (p.b.d.s.f.) de leur expliquer la wilaya comme il leur avait expliqué la salat, la zakat, le jeûne et le hajj. Lorsque ce commandement lui parvint de Dieu, la poitrine du Messager de Dieu (p.b.d.s.f.) se serra, et il craignit qu'ils apostasient de leur religion et qu'ils le démentent. Sa poitrine se serra et il se retourna vers son Seigneur, Puissant et Majestueux. Alors Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, lui révéla :
translations.id: Dan Dia mewajibkan wilayah Ulul Amr. Tetapi mereka tidak mengetahui apa itu, maka Allah memerintahkan Muhammad (saw) untuk menjelaskan wilayah kepada mereka sebagaimana ia telah menjelaskan salat, zakat, puasa, dan haji. Maka ketika perintah itu datang kepadanya dari Allah, dada Rasulullah (saw) menjadi sempit oleh itu, dan ia takut mereka akan murtad dari agama mereka dan mendustakannya. Dadanya menjadi sempit dan ia kembali kepada Tuhannya Yang Maha Perkasa dan Majestic. Kemudian Allah Azza wa Jalla mewahyukan kepadanya:
translations.ru: И Он сделал обязательным вилайят Улул Амр. Но они не знали, что это такое. Тогда Аллах повелел Мухаммаду (мир ему и его семейству) разъяснить им вилайят, как он разъяснил им намаз, закят, пост и хадж. Когда это повеление пришло к нему от Аллаха, грудь Посланника Аллаха (мир ему и его семейству) стеснилась от этого, и он боялся, что они отступят от своей религии и назовут его лжецом. Его грудь стеснилась, и он обратился к своему Господу, Могучему и Величественному. Тогда Аллах, Могучий и Величественный, ниспослал ему:
translations.tr: Ve Ulü'l-emrin velayetini farz kıldı. Ancak onlar bunun ne olduğunu bilmediler. Bunun üzerine Allah, Muhammed'e (s.a.v.s.) velayeti onlara açıklamasını emretti; tıpkı namazı, zekatı, orucu ve haccı onlara açıkladığı gibi. Allah'tan bu emir geldiğinde Rasulullah'ın (s.a.v.s.) göğsü daraldı ve onların dinlerinden döneceğinden ve onu yalanlayacaklarından korktu. Göğsü daraldı ve Rabbine (azze ve celle) başvurdu. Bunun üzerine Allah (azze ve celle) ona vahyetti:
translations.ur: اور اس نے اولی الامر کی ولایت کو فرض کیا۔ لوگ نہیں جانتے تھے کہ یہ کیا ہے، تو اللہ نے محمد صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ کو حکم دیا کہ وہ ولایت کی تفسیر بیان کریں جیسا کہ انہوں نے نماز، زکوٰۃ، روزہ اور حج کی تفسیر بیان کی تھی۔ جب اللہ کی طرف سے یہ حکم آیا تو رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ کا سینہ تنگ ہو گیا اور انہیں ڈر تھا کہ لوگ دین سے پھر جائیں اور انہیں جھٹلائیں۔ چنانچہ ان کا سینہ تنگ ہوا اور انہوں نے اپنے رب عز وجل کی طرف رجوع کیا۔ تو اللہ عز وجل نے ان پر وحی نازل کی:
translations.zh: 并规定乌鲁勒·艾姆尔的威拉亚为义务。但人们不知道那是什么，于是安拉命令穆罕默德（愿主福安之）向他们解释威拉亚，正如他曾向他们解释礼拜、天课、斋戒和朝觐一样。当安拉的命令降临时，安拉的使者（愿主福安之）的心胸因此而郁闷，他担心人们会背离他们的宗教并称他为说谎者。他的心胸郁闷，转向他至尊的主。于是安拉至尊降示他：

translations.bn: [৫:৬৭] হে রাসূল! তোমার প্রভুর কাছ থেকে তোমার প্রতি যা অবতীর্ণ হয়েছে তা পৌঁছে দাও; যদি না করো তাহলে তুমি তাঁর বার্তা পৌঁছাওনি, আর আল্লাহ তোমাকে মানুষ থেকে রক্ষা করবেন।
translations.de: [5:67] O Gesandter! Übermittle, was dir von deinem Herrn offenbart wurde; wenn du es nicht tust, hast du Seine Botschaft nicht übermittelt, und Gott wird dich vor den Menschen schützen.
translations.en: [5:67] O Messenger! Convey what has been revealed to you from your Lord, and if you do not, then you have not conveyed His message, and God will protect you from the people.
translations.es: [5:67] ¡Oh Mensajero! Transmite lo que te ha sido revelado de tu Señor; si no lo haces, no has transmitido Su mensaje, y Dios te protegerá de la gente.
translations.fa: [۵:۶۷] ای رسول! آنچه از پروردگارت بر تو نازل شده ابلاغ کن؛ و اگر نکنی، رسالتش را نرسانده‌ای، و خدا ترا از مردم حفظ می‌کند.
translations.fr: [5:67] Ô Messager ! Transmets ce qui t'a été révélé de la part de ton Seigneur ; si tu ne le fais pas, tu n'as pas transmis Son message, et Dieu te protégera des gens.
translations.id: [5:67] Wahai Rasul! Sampaikanlah apa yang diturunkan kepadamu dari Tuhanmu, dan jika engkau tidak melakukan itu, maka engkau tidak menyampaikan pesan-Nya, dan Allah akan melindungimu dari manusia.
translations.ru: [5:67] О Посланник! Передай то, что было ниспослано тебе от твоего Господа; если ты не сделаешь этого, ты не передашь Его послания, и Аллах защитит тебя от людей.
translations.tr: [5:67] Ey Rasul! Rabbinden sana indirileni tebliğ et; eğer yapmazsan O'nun mesajını iletmemiş olursun. Allah seni insanlardan koruyacaktır.
translations.ur: [۵:۶۷] اے رسول! جو آپ کے رب کی طرف سے نازل ہوا ہے وہ پہنچا دیں اور اگر نہیں کیا تو گویا آپ نے رسالت نہیں پہنچائی اور اللہ آپ کو لوگوں سے محفوظ رکھے گا۔
translations.zh: [5:67]啊，使者！传达你从主所获的启示；若你不这样做，你就没有传达他的信息；安拉将保护你免于众人。

translations.bn: তখন তিনি আল্লাহ তা'আলার আদেশ প্রকাশ্যে ঘোষণা করলেন এবং গাদীর খুম্মের দিন আলী (আঃ)-এর ওলায়াত প্রতিষ্ঠা করলেন। তিনি সমবেত নামাজের ডাক দিলেন এবং লোকজনদের আদেশ করলেন যে উপস্থিত ব্যক্তিরা যেন অনুপস্থিতদের কাছে এটা পৌঁছে দেয়।
translations.de: Da verkündete er offen das Gebot Gottes, Erhaben sei Sein Gedenken, und etablierte die Wilaya von Ali (F.s.i.) am Tag von Ghadir Khumm. Er rief zur Gemeinschaftsprüfung auf und befahl den Menschen, dass die Anwesenden es den Abwesenden übermitteln sollten.
translations.en: So he openly proclaimed the command of God, Exalted is His mention, and established the wilayah of Ali (peace be upon him) on the Day of Ghadir Khumm. He called for congregational prayer and commanded the people that those present should convey it to the absent.
translations.es: Entonces proclamó el mandato de Dios, Exaltado sea Su mención, y estableció la wilaya de Ali (p.b.b.) en el Día de Ghadir Khumm. Convocó a la oración congregacional y ordenó a la gente que los presentes transmitieran a los ausentes.
translations.fa: پس پیامبر امر خداوند تعالی ذکره را آشکارا اعلام کرد و ولایت علی علیه السلام را در روز غدیر خم اقامه کرد. ندای نماز جامعه داد و به مردم دستور داد که حاضران به غائبان ابلاغ کنند.
translations.fr: Alors il proclama ouvertement le commandement de Dieu, Exalté soit Sa mention, et établit la wilaya d'Ali (p.b.l.) le jour de Ghadir Khumm. Il convoqua la prière collective et ordonna aux gens que les présents transmettent aux absents.
translations.id: Maka ia menyiarkan perintah Allah Ta'ala, dan menegakkan wilayah Ali (as) pada hari Ghadir Khumm. Ia menyerukan salat berjamaah dan memerintahkan rakyat agar yang hadir menyampaikan kepada yang absen.
translations.ru: И он открыто провозгласил повеление Аллаха, Превысоко Его упоминание, и установил вилайят Али (мир ему) в день Гадир Хумм. Он созвал людей на общую молитву и приказал, чтобы присутствующие передали это отсутствующим.
translations.tr: O da Allah'ın emrini açıkça ilan etti ve Gadir Hum günü Ali'nin (a.s.) velayetini ilan etti. Toplantı namazı için çağrıda bulundu ve insanlara hazır olanların yoklara tebliğ etmesini emretti.
translations.ur: تو انہوں نے اللہ تعالی کے حکم کا اعلان کیا اور علی علیہ السلام کی ولایت غدیر خم کے دن قائم کی، نماز جامعہ کی ندا دی اور لوگوں کو حکم دیا کہ حاضر غائب کو پہنچائے۔
translations.zh: 于是他公开宣告了安拉至高的命令，并在嘎迪尔·胡姆日宣布了阿里（愿主赐福于他）的威拉亚。他呼唤聚礼并命令众人让在场者向缺席者传达。

translations.bn: উমর ইবনে উযায়না বললেন: 'আবুল জারুদ ছাড়া সকলে একসাথে এটি বলেছেন।' এবং আবু জা'ফার (আঃ) বললেন: 'ফরজগুলো একের পর এক অবতীর্ণ হত, এবং ওলায়াত ছিল শেষ ফরজ। তখন আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লা অবতীর্ণ করলেন:
translations.de: Umar ibn Udhayna sagte: 'Alle sagten dies zusammen außer Abu al-Jaroud.' Und Abu Ja'far (F.s.i.) sagte: 'Und die Pflichten stiegen eine nach der anderen herab, und die Wilaya war die letzte der Pflichten. So offenbarte Gott, Mächtig und Majestätisch:
translations.en: Umar ibn Udhayna said: 'All [the above narrators] said this together except for Abu al-Jaroud.' And Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) said: 'And it was that the obligatory duty was revealed after another obligatory duty, and the wilayah was the last of the obligations. So God, Mighty and Majestic, revealed:
translations.es: Umar ibn Udhayna dijo: 'Todos dijeron esto juntos excepto Abu al-Jaroud.' Y Abu Ja'far (p.b.b.) dijo: 'Las obligaciones descendían una tras otra, y la wilaya fue la última de las obligaciones. Entonces Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, reveló:
translations.fa: عمر بن اذینه گفت: همه با هم این را گفتند جز ابوالجارود. و ابو جعفر علیه السلام فرمود: فریضه‌ها یکی پس از دیگری نازل می‌شدند و ولایت آخرین فریضه بود. پس خداوند عز و جل نازل کرد:
translations.fr: Umar ibn Udhayna dit : 'Tous ont dit cela ensemble sauf Abu al-Jaroud.' Et Abu Ja'far (p.b.l.) dit : 'Et les obligations descendaient l'une après l'autre, et la wilaya était la dernière des obligations. Ainsi Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, révéla :
translations.id: Umar bin Udhayna berkata: 'Semuanya mengatakan ini bersama kecuali Abu al-Jaroud.' Dan Abu Ja'far (as) berkata: 'Dan kewajiban-kewajiban itu turun satu per satu, dan wilayah adalah yang terakhir dari kewajiban-kewajiban. Maka Allah Azza wa Jalla menurunkan:
translations.ru: Умар ибн Узайна сказал: «Все говорили это вместе, кроме Абу аль-Джаруда.» И Абу Джа'фар (мир ему) сказал: «И обязанности нисходили одна за другой, а вилайят был последней из обязанностей. Тогда Аллах, Могучий и Величественный, ниспослал:
translations.tr: Ömer b. Uzayne şöyle dedi: 'Hepsi bunu söyledi; yalnızca Ebu'l-Carûd hariç.' Ebu Ca'fer (a.s.) şöyle buyurdu: 'Farzlar birbiri ardınca iniyordu ve velayet, farzların sonuncusuydu. Bunun üzerine Allah (azze ve celle) indirdi:
translations.ur: عمر بن اذینہ نے کہا: ابو الجارود کے سوا سب نے یہی بیان کیا۔ اور ابو جعفر علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: فرائض ایک کے بعد ایک نازل ہوتے رہے اور ولایت آخری فریضہ تھا۔ پس اللہ عز وجل نے نازل کیا:
translations.zh: 欧麦尔·伊本·乌宰纳说：「除阿布·贾鲁德外，所有人都共同说了这些。」阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐福于他）说：「义务一个接一个地降示，而威拉亚是最后的义务。于是安拉至尊降示了：

translations.bn: [৫:৩] আজ আমি তোমাদের জন্য তোমাদের দ্বীন পরিপূর্ণ করলাম এবং তোমাদের উপর আমার নেয়ামত পূর্ণ করলাম।
translations.de: [5:3] Heute habe ich eure Religion für euch vervollständigt und Meine Gunst über euch vollendet.
translations.en: [5:3] This day have I perfected for you your religion and completed My favor upon you.
translations.es: [5:3] Hoy he perfeccionado para vosotros vuestra religión y he completado Mi gracia sobre vosotros.
translations.fa: [۵:۳] امروز دینتان را برای شما کامل کردم و نعمتم را بر شما تمام گرداندم.
translations.fr: [5:3] Aujourd'hui j'ai parachevé pour vous votre religion et j'ai accompli Ma faveur sur vous.
translations.id: [5:3] Hari ini telah Aku sempurnakan untuk kalian agama kalian dan Aku cukupkan nikmat-Ku atas kalian.
translations.ru: [5:3] Сегодня Я усовершенствовал для вас вашу религию и завершил Свою милость над вами.
translations.tr: [5:3] Bugün sizin için dininizi tamamladım ve üzerinize nimetimi ikmal ettim.
translations.ur: [۵:۳] آج میں نے تمہارے لیے تمہارا دین مکمل کر دیا اور تم پر اپنی نعمت تمام کر دی۔
translations.zh: [5:3]今日，我已为你们完善了你们的宗教，圆满了我对你们的恩典。

translations.bn: আবু জা'ফার (আঃ) বললেন: 'আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লা বলছেন: "এই ফরজের পরে আমি তোমাদের উপর আর কোনো ফরজ অবতীর্ণ করব না — আমি তোমাদের জন্য ফরজসমূহ পরিপূর্ণ করে দিয়েছি।"'
translations.de: Abu Ja'far (F.s.i.) sagte: 'Gott, Mächtig und Majestätisch, sagt: "Ich werde euch nach dieser Pflicht keine weitere offenbaren — Ich habe die Pflichten für euch bereits vervollständigt."'
translations.en: Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) said: 'God, Mighty and Majestic, is saying: "I will not reveal upon you after this any obligation — I have already perfected the obligations for you."'
translations.es: Abu Ja'far (p.b.b.) dijo: 'Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, está diciendo: "No revelaré más ninguna obligación sobre vosotros tras esta — ya he perfeccionado las obligaciones para vosotros."'
translations.fa: ابو جعفر علیه السلام فرمود: خداوند عز و جل می‌فرماید: «پس از این فریضه‌ای بر شما نازل نخواهم کرد، فرائض را برای شما کامل کردم.»
translations.fr: Abu Ja'far (p.b.l.) dit : 'Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, dit : "Je ne ferai plus descendre sur vous d'obligation après celle-ci — J'ai déjà parachevé les obligations pour vous."'
translations.id: Abu Ja'far (as) berkata: 'Allah Azza wa Jalla berkata: "Aku tidak akan menurunkan kewajiban lagi setelah ini kepada kalian — Aku telah menyempurnakan kewajiban-kewajiban bagi kalian."'
translations.ru: Абу Джа'фар (мир ему) сказал: «Аллах, Могучий и Величественный, говорит: "Я не ниспошлю вам более никакой обязанности после этой — Я уже завершил обязанности для вас."»
translations.tr: Ebu Ca'fer (a.s.) şöyle buyurdu: 'Allah (azze ve celle) şunu söylüyor: "Bu farzdan sonra size artık başka bir farz indirmeyeceğim; zira farzları sizin için tamamladım."'
translations.ur: ابو جعفر علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: اللہ عز وجل فرماتا ہے: اس کے بعد میں تم پر کوئی فریضہ نازل نہیں کروں گا، میں نے تمہارے لیے فرائض مکمل کر دیے ہیں۔
translations.zh: 阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐福于他）说：「安拉至尊说：『此后我不会再为你们降示任何义务——我已经为你们完善了义务。』」

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ وَالْفُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ وَبُكَيْرِ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ وَمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ وَبُرَيْدِ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ وَأَبِي الْجَارُودِ جَمِيعاً عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ رَسُولَهُ بِوَلَايَةِ عَلِيٍّ وَأَنْزَلَ عَلَيْهِ إِنَّمَا وَلِيُّكُمُ اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا الَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ الزَّكَاةَ وَفَرَضَ وَلَايَةَ أُولِي الْأَمْرِ فَلَمْ يَدْرُوا مَا هِيَ فَأَمَرَ اللَّهُ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَنْ يُفَسِّرَ لَهُمُ الْوَلَايَةَ كَمَا فَسَّرَ لَهُمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَالزَّكَاةَ وَالصَّوْمَ وَالْحَجَّ فَلَمَّا أَتَاهُ ذَلِكَ مِنَ اللَّهِ ضَاقَ بِذَلِكَ صَدْرُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَتَخَوَّفَ أَنْ يَرْتَدُّوا عَنْ دِينِهِمْ وَأَنْ يُكَذِّبُوهُ فَضَاقَ صَدْرُهُ وَرَاجَعَ رَبَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فَأَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ إِلَيْهِ يَا أَيُّهَا الرَّسُولُ بَلِّغْ مَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ وَإِنْ لَمْ تَفْعَلْ فَمَا بَلَّغْتَ رِسَالَتَهُ وَاللَّهُ يَعْصِمُكَ مِنَ النَّاسِ فَصَدَعَ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ذِكْرُهُ فَقَامَ بِوَلَايَةِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَوْمَ غَدِيرِ خُمٍّ فَنَادَى الصَّلَاةَ جَامِعَةً وَأَمَرَ النَّاسَ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَ الشَّاهِدُ الْغَائِبَ قَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ أُذَيْنَةَ قَالُوا جَمِيعاً غَيْرَ أَبِي الْجَارُودِ وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ وَكَانَتِ الْفَرِيضَةُ تَنْزِلُ بَعْدَ الْفَرِيضَةِ الْأُخْرَى وَكَانَتِ الْوَلَايَةُ آخِرَ الْفَرَائِضِ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ وَأَتْمَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ نِعْمَتِي قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَقُولُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لَا أُنْزِلُ عَلَيْكُمْ بَعْدَ هَذِهِ فَرِيضَةً قَدْ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمُ الْفَرَائِضَ

Hadiths interpreting Quran 5:55 (the verse of wilayah) as referring specifically to Imam Ali's wilayah, including discussions of the context of revelation (asbab al-nuzul).
